Span Chain is an open-source cryptographic audit trail for AI agents.

Produces cryptographic receipts for every agent action — tamper-evident,
SHA-256 hash-chained, append-only. Offline verification via verify_ledger —
no LLM calls or external services required.

Compatible with LangChain, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, AutoGen, and Pydantic AI
via standard OpenTelemetry (OTLP).

Designed to support EU AI Act Article 12 traceability, SOC 2 audit-trail
controls, and HIPAA audit-logging requirements.

Self-hosted via Docker. MIT license. Python + TypeScript SDKs.
https://spanchain.dev
